member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.RenderResolutionDpi
member.summary: Gets or sets the DPI used when rendering PDF pages as thumbnails. Valid range: 36–600. Values outside this range are clamped.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.NativeLibraryLoader
member.summary:
Preloads native libraries required by SkiaSharp and PDFtoImage when the assembly is loaded.
Jellyfin's PluginManager scans all *.dll files recursively in the plugin folder and tries to load them as managed assemblies. Native DLLs (libSkiaSharp, pdfium) cause a BadImageFormatException which disables the entire plugin. To prevent this, the build renames native files to *.native (e.g. libSkiaSharp.dll.native) so the *.dll glob skips them. This class loads the renamed files via NativeLibrary.Load() and registers a DllImportResolver on SkiaSharp/PDFtoImage assemblies so their P/Invoke calls resolve to the preloaded handles.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.PdfImageProvider
member.summary: Provides cover images for PDF files by rendering the first page. Implements so it appears in Jellyfin's library "Image fetchers" settings and is invoked during metadata refresh scans.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.PdfImageProvider.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.PdfImageProvider})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.PdfImageProvider.Name
member.remarks: This name appears in the library's "Image fetchers" settings page.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.PdfImageProvider.GetImages(MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.BaseItem,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks: Called during metadata refresh. Returns a pseudo-URL that encodes the local PDF path; intercepts this URL and renders the PDF instead of making an HTTP request.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.PdfImageProvider.GetImageResponse(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks: Intercepts the pseudo-URL produced by , renders the first page of the PDF with PDFtoImage/SkiaSharp, and returns the JPEG bytes wrapped in a fake — no network call is made.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.PdfThumbnailGenerator
member.summary: Generates thumbnail images from PDF files.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.PdfThumbnailGenerator.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.PdfThumbnailOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.PdfThumbnailGenerator.EnsureThumbnailExistsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Ensures a thumbnail exists for the given PDF file, generating one if needed.
member.param: Path where the thumbnail should be saved.
member.returns: True if a thumbnail was generated; false if one already existed.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.PdfThumbnailOptions.MinRenderResolutionDpi
member.summary: Minimum allowed render resolution in DPI.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.PdfThumbnailOptions.MaxRenderResolutionDpi
member.summary: Maximum allowed render resolution in DPI.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.PdfThumbnailOptions.RenderResolutionDpi
member.summary: Gets or sets the render resolution in DPI. Must be between 36 and 600.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.Plugin
member.summary: The PDF thumbnail plugin for Jellyfin.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Pdf.PluginServiceRegistrar
member.summary: Registers the plugin's services with Jellyfin's dependency injection container. Required in Jellyfin 10.9+ for plugin services to be discoverable.
